programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first day of this new competition is at the Blackthorn Farm BandB on Anglesey, Wales, where best pals Richard Tuke and Susan Hatch hope to be crowned best value BandB of the week. On arrival, Dan and Rachel Lonergan take in the view, and Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor are feeling the vibes for their morning meditation.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Graham and Barbara Yellow pride themselves on offering basic facilities for great value for money at the White Swan Hotel in Yeadon, West Yorkshire. Richard Tuke and Susan Hatch find some hairs out of place in their room, while spiritual couple Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor get good vibes from being in room number four. Over dinner, Graham and Barbara relax into their roles, leaving Rachel Lonergan feeling guilty about having labelled them as game players.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor have an alternative approach to their business at The Old Mill House BandB in Bridport, Dorset. Richard Tuke and Susan Hatch think it will be a wigwam, while Rachel and Dan Lonergan are expecting a commune.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of this week of new episodes is to The Brighton Inn, where BandB newbies Rachel and Dan Lonergan want to offer a luxury, boutique experience for their guests. After getting negative feedback on the last visit, Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor go on the offensive and give their room a thorough going-over.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its the final day of the competition and the BandBers meet for one last time to confront their rivals. Tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: First up, Louise and Daga host at Hotel Penzance in Cornwall, where they hope to wow their guests with breathtaking views. But rather than appreciating the vibrant vista out of the window, some of the BandBers are too preoccupied with their tellies.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Twins Sara and Paula host the weeks second visit at their boutique hotel in Devon, The Horn of Plenty. After an afternoon on the lash at a local vineyard, are there sour grapes in the feedback?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers head to Simon and Vanessas coastal guesthouse in Weymouth, where delightful decor, sumptuous sausages and proper milk await them.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jordan and Robin host the weeks final visit at their country pub, The Drayton Crown, in Somerset. But with one BandBer dreading the potential of stale ale smell, the hosts have their work cut out.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day is here, giving the BandBers a chance to voice their concerns over all the usual pitfalls. After all the skirmishes about squeamish comments and feuds over follicles in the sheets, wholl win the week?

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Hamilton, Scott and Jaquis once-perfect pad is now a domestic battleground. With compromise in short supply, can Kirstie nail it with the extra space they need?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In north London, Kirstie Allsopp helps Digi find a future-proof home, while Phil Spencers with Rebecca and Sohail, whose rental is worth £200k more than their budget to buy.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Danni Menzies returns to the beautiful coastal town of Denia on Spains Costa Blanca to check in on Alison, Brian and their dogs. Jasmine Harman heads back to the sun-kissed shores of Kapparis for a catch-up with Bill and Sandra.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gill and Chris are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary in style by finding their very own cave house in Granadas gorgeous countryside. Can Laura Hamilton deliver the perfect place?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Four years on from his first encounter with Nicola and Paul, Ben Hillman learns how theyve transformed their Lanzarote happy place into a sleek home. And Leah Charles-King takes a windswept walk on the Costa del Sol with Kim and Debbie.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Jean Johansson is back in the countryside near Tomar in central Portugal with Alison and Mike, who she helped find their dream home. And Ben Hillman catches up with Whitney and Rose to see the changes theyve made in Punta Prima.

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Its double trouble for the Bodley family, as cockapoo twins Milo and Mabel burst into the pen. Will canine and family energy levels match? And Floyd the stray lurcher arrives dangerously underweight.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A digger has fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over, blocking one side of a busy A road. Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken down trailer back safely to its owner.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: At Crouch HQ, there is excitement in the air as the team help to make trucking superfan Chriss wedding day extra special. Also, late into the nightshift, Snod is called to recover two crashed cars from the side of the M69.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Dirt road veteran Dennis Dent goes head-to-head with a lifelong nemesis. Meanwhile, Christian Reynolds takes on the wild back country on a vital mission to build a bridge.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Turbo is fighting to stay on track and on schedule to complete a marathon trek home. Meanwhile, in Tasmania Euan is hitching a ride to deliver a volatile road.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Graham is racing the rain and joining forces to build a mega road train. Meanwhile, on a cross-country marathon, Yogis truck hits the wall.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In Townsville, Queensland, long-distance trucker Peter is getting set for a cross-country haul. He has to move this mixed freight through bush, farmland and desert to Darwin.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Matt Adams rides a volatile load into a world of trouble with a bull on board. The Kendalls share a family experience of trucking and another haul carries a sting in the tail.

programme.title: In Old California
programme.desc: Tom Craig is a mild-mannered druggist from Boston who opens a shop in wild and woolly Sacramento shortly before the Gold Rush. The town is `owned by the Dawson brothers, Britt and Joe, who poison Craigs tonic when saloon hostess Lacey Miller takes too much of an interest in the handsome newcomer. Town drunk Whitey has one drink too many, and all of Sacramento is soon in a lynching mood.

programme.title: Traffic Cops

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire, the traffic cops aim to protect lorry drivers and their cargo from organised gangs that target goods and trucks. In one case, a hijack is attempted on an HGV carrying £1 million in goods.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The cops are cracking down on car thieves. Their hunt for a stolen car ends in a dramatic foot chase. Two reckless high performance car thieves lead them on the longest pursuit in the history of the force.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: On a busy Bank Holiday weekend, a day trip to Scarborough turns into a high-speed pursuit and a desperate suspect on a motorbike puts lives at risk when a passenger falls off.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Angus and Sean have to smash down a door in order to save a mans life, veteran interceptor Gordon picks up a gruesome twosome on the M6, and a fleeing Land Rover rams two cop cars in a bid to get away.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Glen rushes to help a woman trapped inside a burning car, Hayley is on patrol during `Black Eye Friday, and Ross and John are called in to help a victim who has been bound and gagged. programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A drunken driver is in the fast lane of the M6, and dog handler Glenn is given a crash course in marine rescue when he answers an emergency distress call.

programme.title: Keemat
programme.desc: A pair of small time crooks, Ajay and Dev, accidentally kill a young man. Feeling guilty they visit the boys family but cannot bring themselves to speak the truth, instead deciding to stay and make amends in secret.

programme.title: Pyar Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Ram Chand, working a simple job despite his qualifications, meets Ravi Chand who is on the verge of suicide. Convincing him to stay alive and then move in with him, Ram helps Ravi find a job, which in turn finds him a wife. When Ram himself finds what he thinks may be a suitable wife he sends a picture to Ravi for approval, but he reproaches him over his choice and is elusive in his reasons why.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Exploring the fascinating lives of Britains beautiful butterflies in exquisite detail and also celebrating their enduring appeal to the British people. Britains butterflies have never been so threatened, three quarters are in decline. A search for butterflies leads to some of the most beautiful parts of Britain. It opens up the possibility that a passion for butterflies could help us preserve our cherished landscapes.

programme.title: Ibsen

programme.title: Mindful Escapes: Breathe, Release, Restore
programme.desc: Join mindfulness expert Andy Puddicombe as he focuses on change and what we can learn from how animals adapt to changes in the world around them. Why is a chameleons ability to alter its appearance crucial to its survival and what lessons are there from understanding how elephants grieve? Learning to be mindful can help us cope with lifes stresses, and Andy shows how focusing on the sights and sounds of the natural world can help us deal with change in our lives.

programme.title: Training Day
programme.desc: Taut urban tale following a rookie cops first day of training in an elite LAPD narcotics squad headed by a veteran policeman with an extreme, often morally questionable approach to law enforcement. The shell-shocked greenhorn is left to consider whether these unorthodox methods are an abuse of power or a necessary evil in a city overrun by violent crime.

programme.title: Victoria and Abdul
programme.desc: Abdul Karim arrives from India to participate in Queen Victorias golden jubilee. The young clerk is surprised to find favour with the queen herself. As Victoria questions the constrictions of her long-held position, the two forge an unlikely and devoted alliance that her household and inner circle try to destroy. As their friendship deepens, the queen begins to see a changing world through new eyes, joyfully reclaiming her humanity.

programme.sub-title: The One Where Theyre Up All Night

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes new job as a telemarketer gets off to a tricky start when the first person she calls, an office worker called Earl, tells her he feels unappreciated and wants to kill himself. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where They All Turn Thirty
programme.desc: Celebrating Rachels 30th birthday inspires the friends to reminisce about their own 30th birthdays. Joey got angry with God for breaking their deal, Ross bought himself a sports car in an attempt to recapture his youth, and Monica got blind drunk and embarrassed herself at her surprise party.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debras tired of sharing all her space with Ray, so he decides to give her exclusive use of their bathroom while he shares the kids.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra are excited to have finally met a couple, Neil and Lauren, who are just like them. Ray starts having mixed feelings though when their son Spencer wreaks havoc around the Barone household.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert think he has finally found the one in Angela. Shes an international-trade lawyer whos bright, speaks four languages, clearly loves Robert, and seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie visits an optician and winds up with a pair of glasses just in time for the holidays. Unfortunately, she ends up putting the whole family on edge when she starts seeing them for better and for worse.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Raymond lies and tells Debra that hes already bought her an incredibly thoughtful Christmas present, he frantically tries to figure out what to get her.

programme.desc: Moronic misdemeanors including petrol station pillocks, a buffoon on a bridge, and bad bears.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Boob Job
programme.desc: Monica secretly asks Joey for a loan because she and Chandler are strapped for cash, Phoebe invites her boyfriend to move in with her, and Rachels apartment baby-proofing drives Joey crazy.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A visit to the set of a soap opera inspires Rachel to dream of a romantic encounter with Joey, and Chandler must take Ross on a weekend getaway after Monica is unable to take time off from work.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Joey and Rachel Kiss
programme.desc: While the friends are still in Barbados, Joey tries to tell Ross about his feelings for Rachel and Ross wants to confess to kissing Joeys girlfriend Charlie, but it is easier said than done. Meanwhile, Monica, Chandler and Phoebe can hear their amorous conversations through the hotels paper-thin walls. Also, Monicas hair problems go from bad to worse, and Phoebe has some bad news for Mikes girlfriend on her birthday.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel gets Monica and Chandler to delay their long-awaited trip to Vermont for Emmas first birthday bash, but problems ensue when Emma falls asleep and a racy cake turns up.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachels Sister Baby-Sits
programme.desc: Rachel regrets trusting her self-indulgent little sister Amy with Emma, Monica regrets asking Joey to write a recommendation letter to the child adoption agency for her, and Phoebe accidentally thwarts the anniversary surprise Mike has in store for her.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Home Study
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fuss over their apartment as they expect a visit from the adoption worker. Meanwhile, Phoebe and Mike opt for a small wedding and donate the extra money to a childrens charity.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Birth Mother
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler are forced to pretend to be a reverend and a doctor when their prospective childs birth mother gets the wrong end of the stick. Meanwhile, Joeys date with Phoebes friend doesnt go well, and Ross is left with an inappropriate outfit for a date with a sexy salesgirl.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
programme.desc: Phoebe and Rachel see Chandler getting into a car with a mystery woman and follow them to a large house in the suburbs. They tell Monica of their fears and are shocked by the truth.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where the Stripper Cries
programme.desc: Joey appears as a celebrity contestant on `The $100,000 Pyramid with its actual host Donny Osmond, but Joeys dubious IQ costs his partner the prize money. Meanwhile, Monica and Rachel hire an ungainly stripper, Roy - without seeing him first - for Phoebes bachelorette party. Also, Chandler and Ross attend a college reunion and meet an attractive woman they both promised not to date during school.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler discover that their prospective adoptive childs biological father may be a `shovel killer, Ross and Rachel get dangerously close when they go to visit her sick father, and Phoebe struggles to teach Joey French for an audition.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel must hire an assistant and agonises over whether to hire an efficient, experienced woman, or sexy young Tag Jones. Ignoring her friends advice, she hires Tag and soon regrets it. To make matters worse, Tag is attracted to Phoebe.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Engagement Picture
programme.desc: While taking an engagement picture for himself and Monica, Chandler cant stop pulling a strange face, Rachel enlists Joey to take Tag out for a night on the town, and Phoebe and Ross date a couple in the middle of a divorce.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Nap Partners

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Rosss Library Book

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Doesnt Like Dogs

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Candy
programme.desc: Rachel is dating her assistant, Tag, but they must keep it a secret at work because of the companys anti-dating policy. Her friends warn her that the relationship will only cause her trouble, but just for fun, she becomes more brazen about it.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Holiday Armadillo
programme.desc: Ross unexpectedly finds himself looking after Ben and decides to do something special for Christmas. Since all the Santa costumes have been rented out, Ross dons the best outfit left and entertains Ben as the holiday armadillo.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Cheesecakes
programme.desc: Chandler and Rachel pig out on a neighbours cheesecake that was mistakenly delivered to Chandler. They feel bad, but not quite guilty enough to refrain from eating a second one that has also been wrongly delivered.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Theyre Up All Night
programme.desc: During their fist night together, Rachel and Tag realise they forgot to ship out an important package at the office.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes new job as a telemarketer gets off to a tricky start when the first person she calls, an office worker called Earl, tells her he feels unappreciated and wants to kill himself. programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Murder on Trial

programme.title: Murder on Trial
programme.desc: In a chilling tale of betrayal, Nikki Sue Entzel plotted with her lover to kill her husband, staging a deadly fire to cash in on life insurance-love, lies, and murder igniting a deadly conspiracy.

programme.desc: Hunters discover the body of a woman in the Georgia woods. As detectives launch a homicide investigation, attention turns to her husband, a former Navy lawyer, whose account raises more questions than answers.

programme.title: Murder on Trial

programme.desc: Detectives in a small Australian town attempt to track down a sadistic killer when residents start finding bodies of dead women in rural locations.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A Colorado war veterans family and stable of horses are ravaged by hurricane-force winds that make subsistence all but impossible. But when the Raneys learn of their larger dream, they pull out the stops with some of their most creative builds yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Oregon homesteaders find their dream in jeopardy following a near-fatal accident; the Raneys face a daunting rescue where a dilapidated bridge has cut them off from their land, and strict building regulations force them to get creative.

programme.desc: The boys are determined to mark the MGBs 60th anniversary in style by buying and fixing up one of these classic motors. Mike takes the plunge with a car that needs upgrades to its transmission and gearbox, but reckons its nothing Elvis cant handl.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: To Ants dismay, Mike buys a 1979 Triumph TR7. Underneath its disco-era styling are some quirks, like a homemade air cleaner, bad wiring and soft shocks.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead work together to give new life to run-down classic automobiles to resell them at a profit. Working on a tight budget, Mike must find a vehicle for Ant to fix, but that isnt always the easiest task.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike searches for an affordable Morgan, but the only one he can find requires the biggest motoring job Edd has ever faced. Can they resurrect this classic British beauty?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike attempts to double his money as he tries to turn a down-at-heel Frogeye Sprite into a premiership quality classic car, then test drives it around the Brooklands Motor Museum.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: The classic Jag E-type is one of the best looking cars in the world and Mike gladly takes a risk on a wreck. However, the parts prices are huge. Will this project crash and burn?

programme.title: Worlds Greatest Motorcycle Rides

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: While bride-to-be Hayley always dreamed of a traditional Jewish wedding, bodylicious Ben would prefer a hot tub wedding. Hayley might be willing to take the plunge or she could end up bubbling with fury.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Sam has £13k to spend on his perfect pixy wedding to his love Luanne. Will sensible Luanne, who dreams of a traditional service, appreciate his outlandish scheme?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Elle has her heart set on a classy wedding at Liverpools iconic Liver Building. But Phil plans a big day to go down in history. Will his scheme turn out a wreck?

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Lorne Abony is the CEO and Chairman of in-store media provider Mood Media, one of the fastest growing companies in America. He adopts a disguise and goes undercover in his own business to find out how efficiently it is functioning.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jim Rogers from Billings, Montana, is the Chairman and CEO of Kampgrounds of America (KOA). Jim goes undercover in his own business disguised as an accountant who has recently been made redundant.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon helps Peters Italian Restaurant in Babylon, New York where the peace of Long Island shore is regularly shattered by the antics of the volatile Pellegrino family, who run the restaurant.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The Mixing Bowl, a bijou diner in Bellmore, New York, is run by talented chef Billy with his wife Lisa and their manager Mike. Despite Billys flair in the kitchen, the business is haemorrhaging money via Mikes out-of-control marketing plans.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the Seascape restaurant in the seaside village of Islip in Long Island, New York. Owner Peter Matthews has been struggling for seven years to make the business viable and now hes nearly reached the end of the line.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon tries to help put a deserted California restaurant back on the map; the restaurants owner does not want to accept the changes, which leads to a screaming match.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Lelas is a fine dining restaurant in Pomona, California, run by inexperienced owner Lela and young chef Ricky. The fatal combination of her ineptitude and his arrogance has resulted in a business so rocky that its about to close down for good.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Part Troll

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: Bernard and Manny agree to teach a psychotic ex-convict to read, while Fran has some problems with her new job.

programme.title: Black Books

programme.desc: An extended version of the show in which new team captain Jon Richardson joins Sean Lock and host Jimmy Carr. With guests Hannibal Buress, Sam Buttery, Stephen Mangan and Katherine Ryan.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: After emigrating to Canada from India five years prior, a couple hope to reunite their extended family under one big roof.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Three previously featured bosses ask employees to go under cover for a second look inside their organisations.

programme.desc: Jeff Platt, president and CEO of entertainment and fitness business Sky Zone, a chain of indoor trampoline parks, goes undercover in his own company posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition who is trying to win an action-adventure holiday.

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon checks into the luxurious Lakeview Hotel on Lake Chelan, Washington, where the bedrooms are empty and the hotels restaurant and ice cream parlour are failing.

programme.desc: The Simpsons house has to be fumigated after an ice hockey player gives his termite-infested stick to Lisa, and the only suitable place the family can find to live is in a TV reality show about life in the 1890s.

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: A pirate Viking beguiles his men with the story of `The Mother of Voices, a huge bell made of solid gold, but his stories reach Aly Mansuh, the leader of an army of Moors, who capture Rolfe and his crew. Mansuh and Rolfe form an uneasy alliance as they set off in search of the treasure.

programme.title: The Northman Interview Special
programme.desc: `The Northman interview special.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: Dissatisfied with King Arthurs rule of peace and freedom, Malagant, an erstwhile ally, turns against the Round Table and establishes a hostile domain. However, he goes too far when he kidnaps the queen and imprisons her in an appalling dungeon. The special skills of the glittering and impetuous swordsman Lancelot must be called upon to effect her rescue.

programme.title: The Northman
programme.desc: Prince Amleth is on the verge of becoming a man when his father is brutally murdered by his uncle, who kidnaps the boys mother. Two decades later, Amleth is now a Viking whos on a mission to save his mother, kill his uncle and avenge his father.

programme.title: Ravenous
programme.desc: Chilling hybrid of black humour and gore set in the US during the 19th century as a stranger arrives at a remote military outpost, claiming to be the sole survivor of a group who became stranded and resorted to cannibalism for survival. Setting out to investigate his claims, the soldiers discover that the truth is even more disturbing than the wanderers story.

programme.title: The Transporter 2
programme.desc: Professional driver Frank Martin is living in Miami, where he is temporarily filling in for a friend as the chauffeur for a government narcotics control policy-maker and his family. The young boy in the family is targeted for kidnapping, and Frank immediately becomes involved in protecting the child and exposing the kidnappers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: This trip, Guys hit the gold mine of surf and turf. In Horn Lake, Mississippi, a Memphis-style barbecue joint puts the championship touch on ribs, cheese fritters, and burgers with pork rinds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Americas most interesting and unique restaurants. In California Guy tries a Tuscan-style Italian restaurant, in North Carolina he has fish tacos and in Honolulu its shepherds pie.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adams all-American eats lands him in Louisville, Kentucky, home to bluegrass, bourbon and the Kentucky Derby. Adam starts off at the legendary Brown Hotel to try a taste of the original Hot Brown.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam travels to Dallas to sample Texas-style bratwurst and BBQ brisket; a Texan seeks victory over five pounds of Vietnamese Pho in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam Richmans eating expedition has brought him to the capital city of the Ocean State - Providence, Rhode Island. Adam first heads over to Bob And Timmys to try their unique grilled pizza.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam Richmans tasty travels take him on a road trip across the Main Street of America, Route 66. Adams first stop is in St Louis, Missouri, to try some famous frozen custards.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adam Richmans culinary quest has him hitting the streets to seek out the best eats. First, he heads south to Tampa Bay, where he samples some authentic Mexican tacos.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: A sampling of Wisconsins finest meats and an eating challenge in under 23 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: The nationwide quest for tasty eats has led Adam Richman to the historic city of Savannah, Georgia. First, Adam heads to Sweet Potatoes for a taste of peach glazed BBQ chicken, a southern classic.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation
programme.desc: Adams cross-country culinary quest brings him to Portsmouth, New Hampshire. Adams first stop is Gilleys, which has been serving up delicious burgers for nearly a century.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: In Charleston, South Carolina, Adam gets a big serving of Southern charm and an even bigger helping of low country cuisine.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Adam braves the Gigante Burrito Challenge at Sweet Ps BBQ.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: On the next leg of his UK tour, James is joined in glorious Devon by his friend and Michelin-starred chef Simon Hulstone. James visits an extraordinary mushroom farm situated in a bungalow, and makes a tasty steak and mushroom dish. Simon samples some award-winning cheese, which inspires James to make a cheese platter fit for a king. The day ends with a trip to the Art Deco splendour of Burgh Island.

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by pal and Michelin-starred chef Mark Jordan, and together they set out to explore the delights of Jersey aboard mini motor bikes. James samples the delights of one of Jerseys most famous exports, the Jersey Royal potato, and he uses them to cook up a squid risotto with a difference. Mark Jordan gets a lesson in oyster shucking, and James discovers an island speciality: Jersey black butter, which he uses to create a delicious sweet treat.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas lead 12 new bakers in a brand-new bubble through new challenges set by judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, in the nations most famous tent.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers take on more challenges set by judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith in the nations most famous tent, in a bid to be crowned star baker.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two remaining chefs from Wales must cook their four course menus again. They must take on board their veterans advice as they serve their tributes to Britains music success.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The three chefs begin by cooking their starters for a surprise veteran of the competition. Chris dish `Brixton Academy Through the Years is his refined take on the classic lamb, post gig junk food he ate after nights out at Brixton Academy.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Chris is cooking his interpretation of the classic beef dish Tournedos Rossini using guinea fowl. His inspiration is Proms in the Park and the British artists who mix classical and modern music styles. Alexs dish commemorates his late brother and the song by Northern Ireland artist DonnaTaggart that he associates with the difficult time of his death.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two remaining chefs from Northern Ireland will recreate their four course menu for the esteemed judges: food writer Matthew Fort, restaurateur Oliver Peyton and broadcaster and cook Andi Oliver. Theres also a guest judge, one of the pop stars the banquet will celebrate.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The chefs battle to get their starter course to the Abbey Road banquet and dont disappoint with stunning dishes dedicated to everything from Tom Jones to Grime. The rivals are cooking to impress food writer Matthew Fort, restaurateur Oliver Peyton, broadcaster and cook Andi Oliver, plus guest judge and British music legend Martin Kemp.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Some of the finest chefs in the UK compete to cook a fish course worthy of serving at a banquet celebrating the brilliance of British popular music, held at Abbey Road Studios. Along with the shows panel of expert judges, the rivals need to impress guest judge Kanya King.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The eight regional champions will compete to get their main courses onto the final menu of the banquet at Abbey Road Studios.They will be cooking for the judges food critic, Mathew Fort, cook and broadcaster Andi Oliver and restaurateur, Oliver Peyton plus guest judge, former Wham! star, Andrew Ridgeley. As ever, the judges will be looking for dishes laced with star quality and a good sprinkling of rock and roll wow factor worth of a banquet full of the music industrys finest.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Some of the countrys finest chefs compete over the final place cooking at a banquet celebrating the brilliance of British popular music, held at Abbey Road studios. Each rival will need to cook a dessert to impress a panel of expert judges, along with guest judge Peter Hook, Joy Division and New Order bassist, and pioneer of Britains Madchester scene.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The chefs must cook in an unfamiliar kitchen and scale up their dishes to provide the highest calibre of dining for a full banquet room of diners. Their guests are celebrities and unsung heroes who have helped create British musics unparalleled global reputation.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Some of the nations greatest chefs battle for the chance to cook a glittering Olympic banquet. The feast will honour the hopes and achievements of the countrys sporting heroes, and it will be a glorious celebration of Britains culinary talents. This time it is the battle of the Scottish chefs - returning contender Alan Murchison and newcomers Colin Buchan and Mark Greenaway.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Returning contender Alan Murchison and newcomers Colin Buchan and Mark Greenaway must cook their fish course, but which one will prevail? Will it be grilled mackerel with beetroot meringues and horseradish ice cream, crab `cannelloni or poached halibut with squid ink? Great British Menu veteran Jeremy Lee will decide who goes through to the judges.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Sir Matthew Pinsent takes time out to meet one of the chefs and give them valuable tips on competing at the highest level. All three chefs are determined to knock out their rivals in the race to the banquet. This is the big one, the main course, but which one will get top marks? Will it be barbecued veal with macaroni cheese, spinach and watercress; beef rump and terrine; or loin of blackface lamb with sweetbreads?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Scottish chefs - returning contender Alan Murchison and newcomers Colin Buchan and Mark Greenaway. All of them are determined to knock out their rivals in the race to the banquet. This is the final chance to impress `Great British Menu veteran Jeremy Lee with their dessert dishes - `Going for Gold, modern day Eton mess, and beetroot cake with chocolate mousse and fennel ice cream.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: It is decision time for the chefs from Scotland. The two remaining chefs cook their entire menus for the `Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton. The judges arent easily pleased and only world class cooking will do. Only one chef can make it through to the national finals to represent Scotland. If they win, one of their dishes could be on the menu at The Olympic Feast.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Central chefs Aktar Islam and Daniel Clifford and newcomer Paul Foster kick things off with their starters, but which one is going to be first off the blocks? Will it be pork neck with ribwort plantain and pork scratchings, veal tartare with caramelised sweetbread and burnt onions or breast of squab with confit leg and chilli and sweetcorn shoots?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Chefs Aktar Islam, Daniel Clifford and Paul Foster cook their fish course, but which one will prevail? Will it be poached ray wing with chicken skin and sea vegetables, stuffed red mullet with roasted artichoke and parmesan puree, or pickled mackerel with smoked langoustine and infused coconut milk?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Chefs Aktar Islam, Daniel Clifford and Paul Foster cook the big one, the main course, but which one will get top marks? Will it be Goosnargh duck breast and hearts with potatoes cooked in pine, slow poached chicken and sweetcorn egg or coriander crumbed lamb loin with sweetbread bhajis and pea pulao?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the final chance for chefs Aktar Islam, Daniel Clifford and Paul Foster to impress Glynn Purnell as they make their desserts - whipped sea buckthorn with meringue and crispy rice, raspberry and tarragon roulade with cookie dough and tarragon oil, and dark chocolate with raspberry jelly and raspberry sorbet. Plus, paralympian Daniel Greaves offers his advice to one chef.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its decision time for the chefs from the Central region. One chef has already left the competition and only two remain to cook their entire menus for the judges - Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton. The judges are not easily pleased and only world class cooking will do. Only one chef can make it through to the national finals to represent the Central region at a glittering Olympic Banquet.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: In this battle of the North East chefs, returning contender Stephanie Moon and newcomers Colin McGurran and Charlie Lakin prepare their respective starters. programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Returning contender Stephanie Moon and newcomers Colin McGurran and Charlie Lakin cook their fish course here. Which one is going to be first off the blocks? programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Returning contender Stephanie Moon and newcomers Colin McGurran and Charlie Lakin cook their main course here. Which one will take gold? programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Returning contender Stephanie Moon and newcomers Colin McGurran and Charlie Lakin have a chance to impress with their dessert dishes. programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its decision time for the chefs from the North East region. One chef left the competition on the previous day and only two remain to cook their entire menus for the `Great British Menu judges Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton. programme.title: Great British Menu

programme.title: Great British Menu

programme.title: Great British Menu

programme.title: Great British Menu

programme.title: Great British Menu

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin is in Walsall in the Midlands looking around a 1950s semi; Martin Roberts meets a man developing a ground-floor one-bedroom flat in Ilford in Essex; and Lucy Alexander catches up on a multi-million-pound redevelopment in East Horsley in Surrey where one small cottage with a big garden is converted into eight separate properties.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A house with a bathroom layout challenge in Ripley, Derbyshire, a huge three-storey house with its freehold on offer in Erdington, Birmingham, and a mid-terrace house in Londons East Ham in need of a major makeover are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin is in Lincolnshire looking round a pair of rural semi-detached cottages which the new owner may convert into one home. Martin Roberts is in Cheshire at a bungalow with bags of potential, and Lucy Alexander is in Kent talking to friends embarking on their first project together.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A house in Chesterton in Staffordshire has a smelly problem and needs a total overhaul. The new owner of a semi in Bestwood in Nottingham also has a lot to do, while the new owner of a flat in Strawberry Hill has less than a week to sort out her auction buy before she jets off to Germany.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A husband and wife duo add their design skills to a house in Croydon in Surrey, while a seasoned developer creates a high-end house in multiple occupation in Coventry and a first time developer also does a great job with a house full of period features in Nutall in Nottinghamshire.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts meets one of two young brothers busy building a property portfolio in Bolsover, Derbyshire, while Dion Dublin checks out a three-bedroom semi in Wolverhampton, and Lucy Alexander is impressed by plans to convert a two-bedroom, fire-damaged terraced house in Londons Plaistow into a smart five-bedroom property.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin has a hair-raising experience at a barbers in Rochdale, Lancashire, while Martin Roberts looks round a great bungalow in Alsager, Cheshire, and Lucy Alexander sees all the potential in a piece of land in Eccles in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts visits a house in Otterton, Devon, which is given a stunning transformation to match the views from the windows, Lucy Alexander looks round a small one-bedroom flat in Tottenham, London, and Dion Dublin peers into a building in Alvaston, Derby, which is in a dangerous state of disrepair.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts visits a house in Otterton, Devon, which is given a stunning transformation to match the views from the windows, Lucy Alexander looks round a small one-bedroom flat in Tottenham, London, and Dion Dublin peers into a building in Alvaston, Derby, which is in a dangerous state of disrepair.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin visit a one-bedroom flat in Catford, London, a large house near the River Mersey and a semi-detached property in Alvaston in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: An end-terrace house in Alfreton in Derby bought by two brothers, a mid-terrace on the coast at Seaham in County Durham and a large three-storey property with a flat and shop in Taylorstown in the Rhondda Valley are all sold at auction. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin talk to the new owners to find out what they have planned for their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts falls in love with a quirky cottage in Malvern bought by a builder and his wife, Dion Dublin talks to a first-time property developer who sees her end-terrace house in Chell in Stoke-on-Trent as something for her pension pot, and Lucy Alexander meets a divorced couple who have decided to form a new union as property developers doing up a shop and flat in Dover, Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A large piece of land in Ratby in Leicestershire, a terrace in Chesterton in Staffordshire and a 1930s semi with a huge garden and huge potential are all sold at auction. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin meet the developers hoping to breathe new life into their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A two-bedroom detached house in Basford in Nottingham, a top floor flat in Portsmouth and a large Edwardian terrace in Crewe are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and hear about their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A multimillion-pound development in Farningham in Kent, an ambitious, total renovation project in Aspatria in Cumbria and a very small studio flat in Wallington in Surrey are all sold under the hammer. Martin and Lucy meet the new owners to discuss their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A Victorian terrace in Londons Greenwich, two flats in Chatham in Kent and a riverside inn near Great Yarmouth in Norfolk are all sold under the hammer. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin meet the new owners and hear plans for their renovation projects.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A three-bedroom house in Borrowash in Derbyshire, another three-bedder in West Bromwich in the Midlands and a quirky four-bedroom house on the Isle of Sheppey are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A flat in Pegswood in Northumberland, a terrace in Swadlincote in Derbyshire and a former shop in Chatham in Kent are given makeovers.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A mid-terrace house in Wales, a basement office in central London with a huge price tag and two flats in Bootle near Liverpool are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy meets a young couple expecting a baby who have to weigh up whether to live in their auction buy in Sydenham in London while Martin talks to a man and his father in law who have bought their first property together in Trentham near Stoke and Dion meets a man who only went into property development after he retired. His latest buy is a three-bed semi in West Bromwich.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Terraced houses in Tunstall in Shropshire and Prescott in Liverpool and a large flat in Dagenham are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion have a look round before hearing what the new owners have planned.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.desc: Ashley Pittman thinks she hit the lottery marrying Jeffrey Scott, and he gives her a cushier life than the one she left behind in small-town Louisiana; however, behind closed doors, a secret soon turns deadly.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Twenty-one-year-old mum, Lauren Kidd, takes an unconventional route through life, but she always follows her heart; the future should be bright, but theres a darkness lurking that no one can stop.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: In Snellville, Georgia, Heather Strube has a great life of working in the family floral shop, raising her toddler son, and looking forward to a bright future with her new boyfriend, until a Sunday trip to the shopping centre shatters everything.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: 14-year-old Ashley Summers vanishes in 2007. The mystery deepens when the FBI connects her case to two other young women missing from her neighbourhood.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: 19-year-old Logan Schiendelman vanishes after a night out. When authorities find no evidence of foul play, they are forced to examine his familys controversial past.

programme.desc: In 1993, a family is torn apart when a mother in Jacksonville, Florida goes missing. The case stumps detectives, who believe that the truth about what happened to her is locked inside the mind of the missing womans three-year-old son.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: In 1996, in Tulsa, Oklahoma, a young mother is found dead on the side of a rural stretch of motorway in an apparent hit-and-run accident. But as the family grieves, the façade begins to crack, and soon the truth seeps out.

programme.title: Mean Girl Murders
programme.desc: At a Warren, Michigan, high school, its the smart, ambitious kids who rule the school. Two of the best and brightest are seniors, Danyna Gibson and Tanaya Lewis. And when they compete for more than just grades, the results turn deadly.

programme.title: The Murder of Sarah Everard: A Faking It Special
programme.desc: A tragic story of a brutal murder and a killer cop. Analysing CCTV, police bodycam and interview tapes, experts unpick the behaviour of notorious killer Wayne Couzens, who murdered 33 year old Sarah Everard in a crime that shocked the nation.

programme.desc: When a California teen disappears, the whole town feels on edge. As suspicion turns inward, her closest friends begin to wonder if the danger was beside them all along, hidden in the familiar faces of classmates with something dark to hide.

programme.desc: The Hill family lives in a gated community near Dawson HS, where their daughter Arrijana is a popular athlete. When she is found murdered in her bedroom, detectives learn that Arrijana was hiding a secret that leads them to her killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here

programme.title: Julia Bradburys Wonders of the Frozen South
programme.desc: Julia Bradbury sails to the rugged island of South Georgia - rising from the South Atlantic like a lost world with staggering natural beauty, it has an extraordinary abundance of wildlife and haunting human history. Landing on Salisbury Plain, home to one of the greatest wildlife spectacles on the planet, Julia navigates past aggressive fur seals that patrol the shoreline to reach a vast colony of over 100,000 king penguins that crowd the beach, a true wonder of the frozen south.

programme.title: James Martins Saturday Morning

programme.title: Jimmy and Shivis Farmhouse Breakfast
programme.desc: Jimmy and Shivi are joined in the kitchen by legendary broadcaster Kaye Adams for cooking, chat and craft - Shivi cooks a breakfast of nasi goreng, theres a delicious smacked cucumber and dumpling salad, and Philippa Gunn gives a lesson on creating easy colourful landscape paintings. Also on the programme, Shivi learns how to navigate using nature with bushcraft and survival expert Mark Beckham.

programme.title: Fletchers Family Farm

Marnie and Milo don their elf costumes to entertain their guests, and behind the scenes Liz and Kelvin work hard to make sure everyone enjoys a magical experience. Alongside the food and drink on offer, the first Fletcher beef is on sale and selling well. Plus, the livestock still need their attention too, as their young tup Kelvin is limping.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway enter the world of St Gerards Hall when a visiting female bishop is found dead after drinking poisoned wine. Was she was murdered because her liberal views contradicted those of the reactionary religious leaders of the college - or is something more sinister afoot? When another two deaths occur, both mirroring murders from Jacobean revenge tragedy, Lewis and Hathaway realise that something twisted is afoot.

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Detective Constable Endeavour Morse returns to Oxford to investigate the disappearance of a missing schoolgirl.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin manages to offend the vicar on his wedding day. After the vicar is involved in an accident with Martin he has to find a replacement quick.

programme.title: Rosemary and Thyme
programme.desc: The Ligurian coast of Italy is no holiday for Rosemary and Laura as they create a restaurant garden for Emma Standish. During a tour of the glorious Giardini Tremonti, the girls are propelled into a mystery when a woman in their party is killed. As they investigate her identity, there are further revelations - and further deaths.

programme.title: Rosemary and Thyme
programme.desc: Rosemary and Laura become involved when an archaeologist, who posed as Rosemary to gain access to the formerly perfect gardens of a large estate, is found murdered.

programme.title: Agatha Christies Poirot
programme.desc: Poirot is called in 14 years after the fact to re-examine the murder of renowned painter Amyas Crale - whose wife Caroline was hanged for the crime - when their grown-up daughter Lucy presents him with a letter written to her by her mother, declaring her innocence.

programme.title: Agatha Christies Marple
programme.desc: In the sleepy English village of St Mary Mead, one man - Colonel Protheroe - is intensely disliked by everyone. Even the vicar has good reason to want to murder him. Then Protheroe is found with a bullet through the head, slumped over the desk in the vicarage study. The obvious suspects seem to be the colonels wife or her lover - but have they been set up? Miss Marple unpicks the truth behind the crime.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott delve into the murder of a visitor to Plummers Relish factory, and discover that the dead man was employed by a rival company. Further investigation reveals a web of secrets and lies within the Plummer family, and a campaign to frighten the family matriarch - but why?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: DCI Vera Stanhope must unravel the circumstances of self-styled entrepreneur Freddie Gills death when his body is found by bailiffs, attempting to repossess his house. Freddie is estranged from his wife and son who have returned to living with her formidable mother Tina, her volatile brother Lee and her taciturn uncle Darren at the familys beloved pub. Matters are further complicated when its revealed Freddie was with someone the night he died and there may be a witness to the crime.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: War Machine: World War II

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: During WWII, a countrys success hinged on the unwavering spirit of its citizens and the ability to secure resources. Efficient supply lines were critical as they provided the means to transport weapons, food and medical supplies to the front lines.

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: After a haunting overview of the Second World War, an epoch of killing that engulfed the world from 1939 to 1945 and cost at least 50 million lives, the inhabitants of four towns - Mobile, Alabama; Sacramento, California; Waterbury, Connecticut; and Luverne, Minnesota - recall their communities on the eve of the conflict.

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: With U-Boats menacing the East Coast, and little good news from overseas, many worry that the United States is utterly unprepared to fight in a `total war but after six months of gruelling combat on Guadalcanal, the Americans finally stop Japans expansion in the Pacific.

programme.title: The War
programme.sub-title: The Worst is Yet to Come: January 1943 - June 1943
programme.desc: A chronological look at US involvement in WWII, from newspaper articles to eyewitness accounts of residents of four quintessentially American towns.

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: On daylight bombing missions American airmen gamble their lives against preposterous odds to bring the war to the heart of Hitlers domain.

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: In November, the Marines take the tiny Pacific atoll of Tarawa, but at a terrible cost.

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: In land warfare, each weapon is developed to fulfil a specific need, but ultimately for the same objective: to dominate enemies in the race for technological supremacy.

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: The evolution of naval warfare sees a shift from battleships to submarines and aircraft carriers. Control of supply lines shapes the war at sea, as decisive battles in WWII become increasingly dependant on the mass production of large-scale vessels.

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: The evolution of aircraft technology and weaponry reshapes military strategies. The development of heavy bombers and agile fighter planes marks a new age in warfare and sees intense competition among forces as they strive for dominance in the skies.

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: During WWII, a countrys success hinged on the unwavering spirit of its citizens and the ability to secure resources. Efficient supply lines were critical as they provided the means to transport weapons, food and medical supplies to the front lines.

programme.title: The Cure for Hate
programme.desc: Tony McAleers personal journey of atonement to Auschwitz-Birkenau and the conditions that led to the rise of fascism in 1930s Europe; how men get into and out of violent extremist groups.

programme.title: Weathered: Earths Extremes

programme.desc: The team restores a childs chair, a musical wedding album and a mechanical, camel-shaped childrens ride weathered by a lifetime spent beside the sea.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: The Repair Shop

programme.title: Colli Cymru ir Môr

programme.title: Antur y Gorllewin

Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley is a Liverpudlian housewife stuck in a loveless marriage. One day she finds herself talking to the wall, and decides to make some changes in her life. Flying off to the Greek island of Mykonos on her own, she is gently romanced by middle-aged waiter Costas.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When Annie and Jay first met, they had an instant and intense romantic connection. However, 10 years and two children later, the flames of passion have dimmed to dull embers. To bring the spark back to their relationship, Annie and Jay decide to record themselves trying out every position in "The Joy of Sex." It seems like a great idea -- until they discover that their private recording has gone public via the Internet.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa .5

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: After guitarist Dewey is kicked out of his own band, he pretends to be a teacher. When he hears the kids play, he realises they could be his support group in the Battle of the Bands, and hell finally get to be the rock star he knows hes destined to be.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Youve Got Mail
programme.desc: Two rival bookstore owners are unaware that they are conducting a secret romance with each other on the Internet. When they discover the truth, they must prevent their business rivalry from interfering with their growing personal intimacy.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine

programme.title: Yesterday

After a freak bus accident during a mysterious global blackout, Jack wakes up to discover that The Beatles have never existed. Performing songs by the greatest band in history to a world that has never heard them, Jack becomes on overnight sensation with a little help from his agent.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Set on a Greek island, a young woman who is about to be married suspects that any one of three men could be her father. She invites them all to her wedding without telling her mother. Movie adaptation of the musical, set to Abbas greatest hits.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: Darkest Hour

With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.desc: A long-smouldering flame is rekindled when a once-popular opera star reunites with her ex-husband and fellow performers at a retirement home for musicians.

programme.desc: A US Marine observes the effects the Vietnam War has on his fellow Marines from their brutal basic training to the bloody street fighting in Hue, Vietnam.

programme.title: Ride On
programme.desc: Washed-up stuntman Luo seeks help from his estranged daughter and her lawyer boyfriend when his beloved stunt horse may be auctioned off to pay his debts. Luo and Red Hare become a media sensation when their fight with debt collectors goes viral.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Four unlikely warriors rise from the sewers and join forces with fearless reporter April ONeil to save New York from Shredder and his evil minions.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie
programme.desc: An ordinary LEGO figurine, thought to be the key to saving the world, is accompanied by a fellowship of strangers embarking on a quest to vanquish a tyrant bent on a terrible deed.

programme.desc: The citizens of Bricksburg face a dangerous new threat when LEGO DUPLO invaders from outer space start to wreck everything in their path. The battle to defeat the enemy and restore harmony to the LEGO universe takes Emmet, Lucy, Batman and the rest of their friends to faraway, unexplored worlds that test their courage and creativity.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: Brothers-in-arms Orion Pax and D-16 become sworn enemies Optimus Prime and Megatron.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In a countryside town bordering on a magical land, a young man ventures into the realm of fairies to retrieve a fallen star in order to win the heart of his beloved.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Charlie Bucket comes from a poor family, and spends most of his time dreaming about the chocolate that he loves but usually cant afford. Things change when Willy Wonka, head of the very popular Wonka Chocolate empire, announces a contest in which five gold tickets have been hidden in chocolate bars. Charlie is one of the five kids who finds a lucky ticket and goes on a tour of Wonkas chocolate factory.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: In a parallel universe, young orphan Lyra Belacqua resides in Oxford under the patronage of her dashing adventurer Uncle, Lord Asriel. When Lyra comes into possession of an alethiometer, a compass that truthfully answers any question, there are people who will do anything to get hold of it, and Lyra finds herself on an epic quest to the frozen North to safeguard the future of her entire world.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: Paul Blart desperately wants to become a cop, but he is too fat to pass the physical exam. He instead works as a security guard in a shopping mall. One day criminals put the mall under siege, and Blart takes it upon himself to save the day.

programme.title: The Tiger Rising
programme.desc: When a boy discovers a caged tiger in the woods near his home, his imagination runs wild as his life begins to change in unexpected ways.

programme.title: The Tiger Rising
programme.desc: When a boy discovers a caged tiger in the woods near his home, his imagination runs wild as his life begins to change in unexpected ways.

programme.title: The Exorcist
programme.desc: A famous actress calls upon medical science for help when her daughter begins behaving strangely, but without any success. Then, as bizarre and horrific incidents involving the daughter increase, her mother turns in desperation to the Church, and to a priest who doubts his own faith.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The curse of an ancient mummy protects buried treasure in the Egyptian desert. An American mercenary who knows of the secret location is rescued from a Cairo prison by an English historian and her brother, and together they set off on a hunt. Along the way, the trio encounter flesh-eating scarab beetles, killer sandstorms, and reincarnated demons.

programme.title: Critters
programme.desc: Hilarity and horror ensue when toothy, carnivorous aliens escape from their space prison, pursued by two merciless bounty hunters. When they reach the Kansas farmhouse of an all-American family, the humans do everything they can to fend off the critters, but they cannot free themselves of the ferocious outsiders.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two wisecracking Miami cops are forced to swap identities in order to track down $100 million of heroin stolen from the police. Their only lead is a young woman who can identify the culprits, but when they track her down, she mistakes one of the cops for his partner, forcing the pair into a bizarre and chaotic life swap.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Scary chiller about a coastal community plagued by a killer shark. With the summer tourist season at hand, the mayor is keen to keep the first attack hushed up. However, when an expert claims that the attacks are the work of a giant great white shark, there is only one solution - to kill the monster fish before it can feed again.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Another great white shark arrives to terrorise the holiday resort of Amity Island. Having recovered from the grisly events of four years ago, the island is once again packed with tourists. Families are sailing in the bay and swimming off the beach, but when two divers and a water-skier go missing, the local police chief fears that he is about to relive his greatest nightmare.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: Second sequel to Steven Spielbergs 1970s blockbuster transports the action from Amity Island to a new undersea kingdom attraction in a Florida theme park. The capture of a baby great white shark is big news and brings crowds to the park - until its mother arrives on the scene.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The curse of an ancient mummy protects buried treasure in the Egyptian desert. An American mercenary who knows of the secret location is rescued from a Cairo prison by an English historian and her brother, and together they set off on a hunt. Along the way, the trio encounter flesh-eating scarab beetles, killer sandstorms, and reincarnated demons.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: On a remote island, a wealthy entrepreneur creates a theme park featuring living dinosaurs drawn from prehistoric DNA. Before opening the attraction to the public, he invites a top palaeontologist, palaeobotanist, mathematician/theorist, and his two eager grandchildren to experience the park. Their park visit is anything but tranquil as the parks security system breaks down, and the prehistoric creatures break out.

programme.title: Critters
programme.desc: Hilarity and horror ensue when toothy, carnivorous aliens escape from their space prison, pursued by two merciless bounty hunters. When they reach the Kansas farmhouse of an all-American family, the humans do everything they can to fend off the critters, but they cannot free themselves of the ferocious outsiders.

programme.title: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: Fang-in-cheek tale about a single-parent family who move to the coastal town of Santa Clara where the local juvenile delinquents are actually a pack of vampires.

programme.title: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: Fang-in-cheek tale about a single-parent family who move to the coastal town of Santa Clara where the local juvenile delinquents are actually a pack of vampires.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
programme.desc: Hobbits Frodo and Sam discover they are being followed by the mysterious Gollum. A mercurial creature who has been warped by the Ring, Gollum promises to guide the Hobbits to the Black Gates of Mordor if they will release him. Middle-earth Aragorn, the Elf archer Legolas and Gimli the Dwarf encounter the besieged Rohan kingdom, whose once great King Theoden has fallen under Sarumans deadly spell.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
programme.desc: The final part of the fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens epic tale. Despite Gollum, hobbits Frodo and Sam reach Mordor in their quest to destroy the `one ring, while Aragorn leads the forces of good against Saurons evil army at the stone city of Minas Tirith. programme.title: Killer Kings

programme.title: Animal Senses
programme.desc: The first sense to evolve in the first animals was chemoreception. It means being able to detect chemicals in the animals environment. This helps animals find prey and mates, and to sense predators from a distance.

programme.title: Animal Senses
programme.desc: The sense of touch is useful to feel physical forces such as bites, changes in temperature and texture. Some animals have become extra sensitive to feel very faint vibrations, which give them a lot of information about their environment.

programme.title: Animal Senses
programme.desc: Seeing the world is one of the most amazing animal adaptations. Different types of eyes give animals different types of vision, and in some cases they can be extraordinary.

programme.title: Animal Senses
programme.desc: Sound waves are produced by movement. Animals have evolved organs to detect those sound waves in the air or water to perceive movements in their environment. This can be used to find prey, predators, and mates. These are some of the animals that have mastered the sense of hearing.

programme.desc: Max is on a mission to unlock and mimic the survival skills of some animals.

programme.title: Over Australia
programme.desc: From the dry plains of the interior come the most recognizable images of Australia, the monolithic red rock of Uluru, the languid, bounding Red Kangaroo. The Arid Heart of Australia is vast and iconic.

programme.title: Over Australia
programme.desc: Created by titanic forces, the Great Dividing Range separates a thin ribbon of green from the continents arid heart.

programme.title: Extreme Africa
programme.desc: South Africas Drakensberg is one of the continents most impressive landscapes. It is home to sharp climatic and ecological gradients as physical conditions change for both land-based creatures and the Raptors that swirl in the skies above.

programme.title: Airborne
programme.desc: Novice fliers tackle their first ascents, earth-bound creatures soar uniquely and sky masters race with speed, power and agility.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve Backshall explores the evolving understanding of whales, how much they have in common with humans, and how recent discoveries could help to better protect them from threats in an increasingly changing world.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve encounters the largest and most sophisticated hunters on the planet, revealing how the ingenious strategies used by whales can sometimes get these extraordinary predators in trouble.

programme.title: Humanlike: The Chimps of Fongoli
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kante and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: Wolves and Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: Ancient Enemies: In Africa, lions and wolves lead their ecosystems. Discover the strength, social strategies and hierarchies behind how they raise and protect their young.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough journeys across the globe to discover how the earliest animals developed on our planet. Attenborough meets expert fossil hunters, and sees on-site some of the most remarkable finds that have transformed our understanding of the first animal life forms, including the first set of eyes and teeth and the first predators and parasites.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenboroughs journey continues in Canadas Rocky Mountains, where fossils document an explosion in animal diversity never seen before or since. Travelling on to North Africa, the rainforests of Australia and the east coast of Scotland, Attenborough discovers how animals evolved to conquer not only the oceans but also the land and air.

programme.title: The Bachelor King
programme.desc: David Attenborough takes a birds-eye view in this spectacular documentary, charting the king penguins attempts to survive, find love and raise a family in the unforgiving Antarctic.

programme.title: Humanlike: The Chimps of Fongoli
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kante and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: Wolves and Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: Ancient Enemies: In Africa, lions and wolves lead their ecosystems. Discover the strength, social strategies and hierarchies behind how they raise and protect their young.

programme.title: Wild Canary Islands
programme.desc: When rocks engulfed by flames emerge from the middle of the ocean, new opportunities arise for the species that manage to reach them... This is the case of the Canary Islands, eight islands born from fire, that form an archipelago full of life.

programme.title: Valley of Flood and Fire
programme.desc: Its the end of November in the Luangwa Valley, and the rains have just begun. It marks the end of one of the toughest dry season on record, and triggers a transition from parched wilderness to luscious wetland.

programme.title: Valley of Flood and Fire
programme.desc: Its the end of November in the Luangwa Valley, and the rains have just begun. It marks the end of one of the toughest dry season on record, and triggers a transition from parched wilderness to luscious wetland.

programme.title: Africas Wild Horizons
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to incredible diversity.

programme.title: Africas Wild Horizons
programme.desc: The Namib Desert is a land of extremes, from icy ocean to baking sand. It takes toughness and adaptation to live in this desert, and only a special few can.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: In Central Namibia, a painted wolf pack roams the vast, drought-ravaged wilderness,led by their matriarch, Zeema.

programme.desc: The lives of monkeys, chimps, orangutans and apes at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: After weeks of battling a mysterious head infection, Erik joins the group two students. At forest school, the group three students enjoy a poolside classroom where Valentino proves hes more than just a class clown.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When NASA tells a nervous Wolowitz that his space mission has been rescheduled, he tries to use the wedding as an excuse not to go, but hes forced to agree when he realises that Bernadettes father only likes him because hes an astronaut. Amy develops a cunning psychological plan to bring Sheldon closer, and Penny is surprised by a proposal at an inappropriate moment.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

They scramble to organise a wedding ceremony at City Hall in the short time available, but their plans go awry. Can their friends step in to find an ordained minister and a romantic wedding venue before its too late?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Will Wolowitz ever get the recognition he deserves as an astronaut?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: There was a time when the British pub was pretty much a male-only establishment and food, at best, was a bowl of nuts and some pork scratchings.
